productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women White Printed Top
description: Composition White round neck neck top made of 65% polyester and 35% viscose, has three-quarter sleeves with graphic print Wash care Hand wash cold using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery For the sassy and romantic fashionista, this top from united colors of benetton has a covertly feminine appeal. Understated tops are the flavour of the moment and this top with its simplistic cut and narrowing silhouette is an example of the label's versatile style. Pair this with skinny jeans, a jacket and red closed toe pumps from catwalkSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'.8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
